name: Gum Drop Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Vegetable shortening (solid, in a can)
1 lb Gum drop candy, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the vegetable shortening, sugar, and eggs. Beat well.
2. Add milk, flour, and baking powder to the mixture; mix until combined.
3. Fold in the gum drops.
4. Grease and flour a loaf pan (9 x 5-inch recommended).
5. Bake at 350°F for 50-55 minutes, or until tested done.
